heading: Status of participants
label: 7615 Status of participants
text: Participants in the Scholarship Program shall not by reason of their participation in such program (1) be considered to be employees of the Federal Government, or (2) be counted against any personnel ceiling affecting the Veterans Health Administration.
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “Veterans Health Administration” for “Department of Medicine and Surgery”.Pub. L. 103–4461991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4315 of this title
amendments: Amendments1994— substituted “Veterans Health Administration” for “Department of Medicine and Surgery”.Pub. L. 103–4461991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4315 of this title
